proposition: Lukáš Oslzla was jednatel and co-owner of Blackfish & Co. s.r.o. from June 2022, exiting in February 2024 — about 17 months before Able.cz's 2025 acquisition. No public source explains the departure. He and Vít Schlesinger were separately both involved with the same entity, Artstay s.r.o. (IČO 10847031, later renamed Lovs & Co. s.r.o.): Schlesinger 2021–2024, Oslzla as its sole owner from 2021/2022 onward — a second link between the two men beyond Blackfish.
shortTitle: Lukáš Oslzla was jednatel and co-owner of Blackfish & Co. s.r.o.…
statusExplanation: Podpořeno více nezávisle vzniklými rodinami zdrojů. Pozor: dvě zrcadla téže autority nejsou nezávislé potvrzení.

sources.title: Czech commercial register — aggregator mirror search (kurzy.cz, rejstrik-firem)
CzechCrunch — Blackfish's 2021 Denmark expansion (names Oslzla as ~30% owner)

supersededReason: Overloaded, and the renaming direction was recorded backwards (the register shows Lovs & Co. s.r.o. was renamed TO Artstay s.r.o. on 13 Feb 2024, not the reverse). Split and primary-sourced 2026-07-18; see CON-03 for the 2021 media-vs-register ownership timing.
